carrier.clock_source: 32.768 kHz TCXO / 8, locked to house 10 MHz reference

coil.topology: opposed copper/silver coils, complementary non-overlap half-bridge

placement.note: coil pair centered on shaft midpoint prior x_g

energy.estimation_method: 0.5*L*I^2 per pulse x exact ON cycles per macrocycle (resistance neglected - Derived proxy, RG-14)

reference_clock.generator_phase_priming_note: generator primed to constant phase offset at each trigger (KOS-13)

notes: Example instance for drive_config.schema.json; 60 V / 1.3 us / 3 A is the 101 mm source test point (Source claim).
